niral.name: NIRAL 2026
niral.full_form: National Innovative Research and Academic League
niral.description: NIRAL is the flagship technical symposium of the Information Science and Technology Department at College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University.
niral.venue: College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai
niral.history: Since its inception, NIRAL has been a beacon of innovation, bringing together brilliant minds from across the nation. Over 15+ years of excellence with 100+ participating colleges and 10,000+ total participants.
niral.vision: To create a platform where academic brilliance meets practical innovation, fostering the next generation of tech leaders.
niral.mission: NIRAL serves as a catalyst for technological advancement, encouraging students and researchers to explore uncharted territories in computer science and information technology.

ist_department.name: Information Science and Technology Department
ist_department.description: The IST Department at CEG is one of the premier departments offering cutting-edge education in computer science, information technology, and emerging technologies.

contact.address: IST Department, College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai - 600025

technical.description: Technical events focus on programming, coding, and technical problem-solving skills.
technical.note: Check the events list for specific technical events available at NIRAL 2026.

non_technical.description: Non-technical events include quizzes, creative competitions, and fun activities.
non_technical.note: Check the events list for specific non-technical events available at NIRAL 2026.

registration.process: Browse events → Select interests → Get recommendations → Register for events
registration.requirements: Valid email ID and college ID
registration.payment: Some events are free, others require registration fees
registration.confirmation: Email confirmation sent after successful registration

faqs.question: How do I register for NIRAL 2026 events?
faqs.answer: Login to the platform, browse events, select your interests to get personalized recommendations, and click Register on your chosen events.

faqs.question: What are the dates for NIRAL 2026?
faqs.answer: NIRAL 2026 will be held from March 12-14, 2026 at College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai.

faqs.question: Are there any registration fees?
faqs.answer: Some events are free while others require registration fees. The fee details are mentioned on each event page.

faqs.question: Can students from other colleges participate?
faqs.answer: Yes! NIRAL welcomes students from all colleges across India. We have had 100+ participating colleges in previous editions.

faqs.question: What types of events are conducted?
faqs.answer: NIRAL hosts Technical events (SQL, DSA, UI/UX, etc.) and Non-Technical events (Treasure Hunt, Quiz, IPL Auction, Photography, etc.). Check the events list for complete details.

faqs.question: How are events recommended to me?
faqs.answer: Our AI-powered recommendation system uses machine learning to suggest events based on your selected interests and preferences.

faqs.question: What is the prize pool for events?
faqs.answer: Prize pools vary by event type. Technical events typically range from ₹5,000-₹50,000, while hackathons can go up to ₹1,00,000.

faqs.question: Will I receive certificates?
faqs.answer: Yes, all participants receive participation certificates. Winners receive winner certificates along with prizes.
